name: Black and White Shortbread Squares
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Almonds, Roasted Lightly Salted, diced
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F. In a food processor, combine flour, powdered sugar, butter, and vanilla. Process until crumbly. Add melted semisweet chocolate and process until dough leaves sides of bowl and forms a ball.
2. Press dough evenly over bottom of a foil-lined 10 x 15-inch jelly-roll pan. Bake 17 to 20 minutes, or until set.
3. Sprinkle cut-up white chocolate evenly over top. Return to oven for 1 to 2 minutes, or until white chocolate melts. Remove from oven and let stand 2 to 3 minutes.
4. With a table knife, spread melted white chocolate evenly over top. Sprinkle almonds on top, pressing in slightly. Let stand 45 minutes, then cut into 54 squares about 1 1/2 inches; cookies will still be warm. Let cool in pan. Refrigerate to set up white chocolate. Store, covered, in refrigerator.
